exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: May 29: hit 65 × 11 on last set — bumping to 70 lb. Controlled 2-sec eccentric. Using flat today since you did incline Wednesday.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Holding at 35 per shoulder protocol — you've been getting 12–14 on set 3, shoulder is trending well. Next bump to 40 lb once cleared.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.note: Machine was taken June 3 — try it today. If taken again, sub double KB bent-over rows at 40 lb × 10 × 3. T-bar: neutral spine, drive elbows back.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: May 29: got 3×10 but last two reps were sloppy. Holding at 150 — focus on clean form. Full stretch at the start, don't yank with the lower back.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Elbows high and wide, pause at peak contraction. These protect the shoulder — don't skip them.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + Hammer Curl
exercises.detail: Rope pushdown 80 lb × 12 + Hammer curl 25 lb × 12 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Pushdown: full extension at bottom, squeeze. Hammer curl: elbows pinned, no swinging.

exercises.name: Core Circuit C
exercises.detail: Cable Crunch 50 lb × 12 + Hanging Knee Raise × 10–12 + Side Plank 30s/side · 2 rounds
exercises.rest: Minimal rest between movements, 60s between rounds
exercises.note: You skipped core Wednesday — get it done today. Cable crunch: round into it, don't just hinge at the hips. Hanging knee raise: control the descent.
